Veterans Benefits: Colorado offers military retired pay tax subtractions, a disabled veteran and surviving spouse property tax exemption equal to 50% of the first $200,000 of actual value for eligible primary residences, education and tuition assistance, vehicle plates, and hunting and fishing license benefits.
LGBTQSource: MAP Colorado Equality Profile 2026; no HRC MEI coverage found for Pueblo
Description: Southern Colorado city on the Arkansas River with low housing and living costs, a local VA clinic, high veteran presence, and strong access to Lake Pueblo, the Riverwalk, and mountain recreation. It offers affordability and outdoor amenities, while elevated crime rates and a smaller job market are material tradeoffs.
